summary: Tested two new features: (1) Form Fields Configuration - admin can customize which fields appear in 'Crear Orden' form via FormFieldsManagerModal, (2) MASTER board mirror icon - column headers show a mirror/reflection SVG icon only when on MASTER board. All backend API tests pass (9/9). All frontend features verified working.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/config/form-fields returns form field configuration - PASS
Backend: GET /api/config/form-fields requires authentication (401 for unauthenticated) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/config/form-fields allows regular users to read (needed for form) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/form-fields saves field list (admin only) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/form-fields returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/form-fields returns 401 for unauthenticated - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/form-fields accepts empty fields list - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/form-fields works with custom column keys - PASS
Backend: Form fields config persists correctly in database - PASS
Frontend: Admin sees 'Campos del Formulario' button (ClipboardList icon) in header - PASS
Frontend: Non-admin does NOT see FormFieldsManagerModal button - PASS
Frontend: FormFieldsManagerModal opens and shows all available columns as toggleable items - PASS (23 fields visible)
Frontend: Admin can toggle fields on/off and save configuration - PASS
Frontend: Success toast 'Campos del formulario actualizados' shows after save - PASS
Frontend: NewOrderModal loads form fields from /api/config/form-fields on open - PASS
Frontend: NewOrderModal shows only the configured fields dynamically - PASS
Frontend: NewOrderModal supports select, date, text, number field types - PASS
Frontend: Order creation with configured form fields works correctly - PASS (created TEST-FORM-46354)
Frontend: When in MASTER board, column headers show mirror SVG icon - PASS
Frontend: When NOT in MASTER board (e.g., SCHEDULING), column headers do NOT show mirror icon - PASS

issues: Existing hydration warnings in console (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)

seed_data_creation: Created test order TEST-FORM-46354 during form creation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features added and verified: (1) Form Fields Configuration allows admin to customize 'Crear Orden' form fields via FormFieldsManagerModal. Config stored in form_fields_config collection. (2) Mirror icon appears in MASTER board column headers only. Both features working correctly. Test file: test_iteration36_form_fields.py
